message:
feat(tests): add T5.8 web/gRPC cross-implementation interop matrix (66 tests)

Covers 10 sections of the parity contract surface:
- T52-ROUTE: router path matching, nesting, method dispatch, fallback (6 tests)
- T53-EXTRACT: query, JSON, form, state, raw body, cookie, path (7 tests)
- T54-MW: CORS preflight+Vary, compression, auth, timeout, panic, body limit,
  request ID, normalize path, response headers, security (12 tests)
- T56-GRPC: codec encode/decode, status codes, metadata, request/response flow,
  method descriptors, channel config (7 tests)
- T57-HEALTH: health service status, unknown service, reflection list/describe (5 tests)
- T58-CODEC: uncompressed frame format, empty/large messages, partial buffering (4 tests)
- T59-ICEPT: fn interceptor, auth token, timeout, metadata propagator, chain ordering,
  rate limiter (6 tests)
- T60-GRPCWEB: content type detection, binary/text frame roundtrip, trailers (6 tests)
- T61-LIFE: session lifecycle, health check, router+middleware+state (3 tests)
- T62-CX: status roundtrip, metadata ordering, codec, router determinism (4 tests)

Closes T5.8 (asupersync-2oh2u.5.8).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
